determination: LIBERTY CANONICAL LOCATION AND MOBILE REFRESH FIX PASS WITH OBSERVATIONS

canonicalLocation.validation: Static validation confirms submitted reports receive canonicalDisplayLocation/canonicalLocationPhrase and alert/label/authoritative display paths consume that field before independent fallback lookup.

mobileRefresh.afterExpectedProfileMs: local submit path avoids synchronous refreshReportHazardViews/renderUnifiedIncidents chain; remaining synchronous work is snap + insert + local registration, with surface refresh deferred to next frame/setTimeout
